units.name: Public API Surface: Types, Preset, Factory, and Exports
units.description: Build the new public API layer for the cleartext module in four coordinated changes: (1) Replace CleartextFhevmConfig with CleartextChainConfig in types.ts — add the nested contracts object (acl, executor, inputVerifier, kmsVerifier, verifyingInputVerifier, verifyingDecryption) and change provider to rpcUrl: string | EIP1193Provider. (2) Create presets.ts with the hardhat preset (sourcing addresses from hardhat/deployments.json) and the VERIFYING_CONTRACTS constant; consolidate all hardhat-related constants currently scattered in constants.ts or elsewhere into this file. (3) Implement createCleartextRelayer(config: CleartextChainConfig): RelayerSDK in a new factory.ts that maps the public CleartextChainConfig shape to the existing internal constructor arguments. (4) Replace the contents of index.ts with minimal exports: createCleartextRelayer, hardhat, FheType, and CleartextChainConfig type — stripping all internal symbols. Add thin factory-level integration tests verifying that createCleartextRelayer(hardhatPreset) returns a valid RelayerSDK instance.
acceptance: CleartextChainConfig interface in types.ts has chainId: bigint, gatewayChainId: number, rpcUrl: string | EIP1193Provider, and nested contracts: { acl, executor, inputVerifier, kmsVerifier, verifyingInputVerifier, verifyingDecryption }
presets.ts exports hardhat preset that satisfies CleartextChainConfig using addresses imported from hardhat/deployments.json
presets.ts exports VERIFYING_CONTRACTS with inputVerification and decryption fixed addresses
All hardhat-specific constants previously in constants.ts are consolidated into presets.ts
createCleartextRelayer(config: CleartextChainConfig): RelayerSDK is exported from factory.ts and correctly maps config.contracts.* fields to the internal constructor argument names
index.ts exports exactly: createCleartextRelayer, hardhat, FheType, CleartextChainConfig — no other symbols
CleartextFhevmInstance class is not importable from @zama-fhe/sdk/cleartext
MOCK_INPUT_SIGNER_PK and MOCK_KMS_SIGNER_PK are not importable from @zama-fhe/sdk/cleartext
Factory-level test: createCleartextRelayer(hardhatPreset) instantiates without throwing and the returned object satisfies the RelayerSDK interface shape
pnpm run typecheck passes with zero errors

units.name: Implement delegatedUserDecrypt and createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712
units.description: Add two concrete method implementations to CleartextFhevmInstance in cleartext-fhevm-instance.ts, replacing any current stubs/throws: (1) delegatedUserDecrypt — add the isHandleDelegatedForUserDecryption ABI fragment to ACL_ABI, then for each normalized handle call acl.isHandleDelegatedForUserDecryption(delegatorAddress, signerAddress, contractAddress, handle) and throw a descriptive Error if it returns false, then read plaintexts identically to userDecrypt and return Record<string, bigint>. (2) createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712 — return EIP-712 typed data with domain using verifyingContractAddressDecryption as verifyingContract and a message that includes publicKey, contractAddresses, delegatorAddress, startTimestamp, durationDays, and extraData. Add unit tests in the existing __tests__ files covering: ACL delegation check fires per handle, throws with message containing handle/delegatorAddress/signerAddress/contractAddress on failure, success path returns correct plaintext mapping, and createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712 returns domain and message with correct delegatorAddress field.
acceptance: ACL_ABI in cleartext-fhevm-instance.ts includes isHandleDelegatedForUserDecryption(address,address,address,bytes32) view returns (bool) fragment
delegatedUserDecrypt calls isHandleDelegatedForUserDecryption(delegator, delegate, contractAddress, handle) for every handle before reading any plaintext
delegatedUserDecrypt throws an Error whose message contains the handle hex, delegatorAddress, signerAddress, and contractAddress when the ACL check returns false
delegatedUserDecrypt returns Record<string, bigint> mapping each handle to its plaintext when all handles pass the ACL check
createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712 returns an object with domain.verifyingContract equal to verifyingContractAddressDecryption and message containing a delegatorAddress field
Unit test: delegatedUserDecrypt with a mock ACL returning false for a handle throws with the handle hex in the error message
Unit test: createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712 returned message.delegatorAddress matches the input delegatorAddress parameter
pnpm run typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm run test passes for all tests in packages/sdk/src/relayer/cleartext/__tests__/

units.name: Update Playwright Fixture to Use Factory
units.description: Update packages/playwright/fixtures/fhevm.ts to replace the direct CleartextFhevmInstance constructor call and its associated imports with createCleartextRelayer(hardhatPreset). Specifically: swap the import of CleartextFhevmInstance (and any of GATEWAY_CHAIN_ID, VERIFYING_CONTRACTS, JsonRpcProvider, deployments.json) for createCleartextRelayer and hardhat from @zama-fhe/sdk/cleartext; replace the constructor invocation with createCleartextRelayer(hardhat). Leave all CDN interception logic, route proxying, and the rest of the fixture file completely unchanged.
acceptance: fhevm.ts imports createCleartextRelayer and hardhat from @zama-fhe/sdk/cleartext
fhevm.ts does not contain any import of CleartextFhevmInstance, GATEWAY_CHAIN_ID, VERIFYING_CONTRACTS, JsonRpcProvider, or deployments.json
The relayer is constructed via createCleartextRelayer(hardhat) — no direct new CleartextFhevmInstance(...) call remains
All CDN interception and route proxying code in fhevm.ts is byte-for-byte identical to before this change
pnpm run typecheck passes with zero errors in the playwright package
